title: rosa glauca var. rigida
intro: Rosa glauca var. rigida, also known as the rigid-leaved pink dog rose, is a variety of the glaucous-leaved rose (Rosa glauca) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and inflammation due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa glauca var. rigida include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive problems, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Rosa glauca var. rigida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
